findings.title: Parent and 3 of 4 child tasks.md are unclosed despite remediation completion
findings.impact: validate.sh --strict + memory-derived status report Phase 017 as incomplete; /spec_kit:resume will mis-route operators
findings.recommended_action: sweep-close task lines with [EVIDENCE: <commit>] markers; update Progress Summary status column

findings.title: v3.4.0.2 changelog cites no real Phase 017 commit hashes
findings.impact: headline claims (e.g. H-56-1 canonical save metadata no-op eliminated) have no code back-link from global changelog
findings.recommended_action: add commit manifest table OR inject [EVIDENCE: <commit>] closers in Detailed Changes bullets

findings.title: 004-p2-maintainability/graph-metadata.json.parent_id uses non-canonical filesystem-prefixed key
findings.impact: memory-search / skill_graph_validate may emit duplicate node or miss parent-chain join
findings.recommended_action: normalize parent_id to packet-pointer form; rerun generate-context.js

findings.title: Parent vs child implementation-summary commit attribution asymmetry
findings.impact: child 004 under-attributes T-YML-CP4-01; parent+children have no reconciled roll-up of support/finalization commits
findings.recommended_action: add Unattributed section to parent OR surface b26514cbc in 004-p2-maintainability/implementation-summary.md

passes.title: Every 017 commit cites a finding ID or task ID
